subject: Fwd: Cordero
body:
Please let me know if and when you receive the Cordero complaint in the  mail 
at 71st Street.  Thanks.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: "Sheryl E. Reich" <reich@lefcourtlaw.com>
Subject: Cordero
Date: Wed, 14 Nov 2007 16:26:35 GMT
To: DKIesq@aol.com

I should have mentioned this before, but I assume that if Jeffrey is
sent the Cordero complaint in the mail you will let us know.  Both nail
and mail and leave and mail service require a mailing.  Knowing when it
occurs will help establish the time for response.

 

__________________________

Sheryl E. Reich, Esq.

Gerald B. Lefcourt, P.C.

148 East 78 Street

New York, N.Y. 10075

(212) 737-0400 tel

(212) 988-6192 fax

Reich@lefcourtlaw.com

NOTE NEW ZIP CODE AS OF 7/1/07
